question: It is getting late on Friday. You are reviewing your employees annual self evaluation. Your comments are due on Monday. You can email your employees information to yourself so you can work on it this weekend and go home now. Which method would be the BEST way to send this information?
canonical_answer: Use the government email system so you can encrypt the information and open the email on your government issued laptop

appears_in.title: Annual Cyber Awareness Training Army
